purpose: Wait for a release PR to go green, squash-merge it, and report branch-specific merge evidence to a managed goal. No agent.

pr.description: Release pull request number to merge.

issue.description: GitHub issue number to work on.

goal.description: Managed goal id to report merge evidence to.

timeout-seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for pending checks before failing. Default 1800.

poll-seconds.description: Seconds between CI polls while waiting. Default 30.

success: release-merge completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: release-merge cannot return a valid canonical result
